    "Lack of effective ground-fault path"
  ],

    "Trace and connect the equipment grounding conductor to the receptacle and box",

    "If no ground exists in the box, replace with a GFCI receptacle and label it 'No Equipment Ground' per NEC 406.4(D)(2)"
  ],
  "rationale": "An open ground condition fails to provide a low-impedance path for fault current, presenting a severe shock and electrocution hazard. This violates NEC 406.4 requirements for grounding-type receptacles.",
